description: Legal deed. Location: Alexandria. Dated: 4849 AM = 1088/89 CE. In which a woman, whose identity is established in court by ʿEli ha-Kohen, appoints an agent (wakīl) to demand support from her husband, for her children were without food and clothing. Signed by Shela b. Mevasser and Merayot b. Yosef ha-Kohen Av ha-Yeshiva. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: שטר משפטי; אלכסנדריה; 4849 לבריאה (1088/89 לספירה); אישה שמידותיה הוכרו על ידי עלי הכהן ממנה שליח לדרוש מזונות מבעלה שהילדים ללא אוכל ובגדים
